name: Sort POP
description: The Sort POP sorts the point list and/or the primitive list based on the position P or any attribute component. When sorting by P it can sort the points relative to a vector, or proximity to a point, or relative to a Geometry COMP's Z axis. The Sort POP can also randomize the point order, or shift the point order (circularly in the point list, like first point becomes the second point and the last point becomes the first). It can do the same operations to primitives. It implements https://gpuopen.com/fidelityfx-parallel-sort/

parameters.name: Point Method
parameters.label: Point Method
parameters.description: Point sorting criteria.

parameters.name: Attribute
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to use for sorting.

parameters.name: Attrib is UInt
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When sorting by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes to sort.

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Seed for random number generator for randomly-ordered points.

parameters.name: Point
parameters.label: Point
parameters.description: Proximity Point.

parameters.name: Vector
parameters.label: Vector
parameters.description: When sorting points Along Vector, it takes the point position, finds the the closest point on a line through 0,0,0 in the direction of the vector, and then sorts along that line.

parameters.name: Object
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: 3D Object to use when sorting points relative to Object Z-axis.

parameters.name: Reverse
parameters.label: Reverse
parameters.description: After sorting points, reverse their order.

parameters.name: Shift
parameters.label: Shift
parameters.description: Enables offsetting on sorted points.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shifts the point order by this offset.

parameters.name: Primitive Method
parameters.label: Primitive Method
parameters.description: Primitive sorting criteria.

parameters.name: Attribute
parameters.label: Attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to use for sorting.

parameters.name: Attrib is UInt
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When sorting by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes to sort.

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Seed for primitive ranomizer.

parameters.name: Point
parameters.label: Point
parameters.description: Position when sorting by proximity to point.

parameters.name: Vector
parameters.label: Vector
parameters.description: When sorting primitives Along Vector, it takes the center of the primitive, finds the closest point on a line through 0,0,0 in the direction of the vector, and then sorts along that line.

parameters.name: Object
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: 3D Object to use when sorting primitives relative to Object Z-axis.

parameters.name: Reverse
parameters.label: Reverse
parameters.description: Reverse the order of primitives.

parameters.name: Shift
parameters.label: Shift
parameters.description: Enables offsetting on sorted primitives.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shifts the primitive order by this offset.
